L1.area: General-purpose utility classes for data parsing and document processing

L2.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists where an XML processing component does not enable secure processing restrictions. An attacker can supply a crafted XML document that references external entities, potentially leading to disclosure of confidential data, server-side request forgery, or denial of service.

L3.area: XML document parsing and schema validation utility classes
L3.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists where the schema factory used during XML schema validation does not have secure processing enabled. When validating XML documents against a schema file, an attacker can supply crafted input containing external entity references, potentially leading to disclosure of confidential data, server-side request forgery, or denial of service.

ground_truth.reason: The SchemaFactory used for XML schema validation does not have secure processing enabled, allowing XML External Entity (XXE) attacks via crafted XML input.
